race.comment: THUNDARA (11) is desperate to break through soon, hitting the line strongly in her first three starts. The rise to the mile looks perfect fourth-up and she gets the chance to settle much closer drawing the inside pillar. Is the one to beat. JUMBO JET (4) had the map advantage of THUNDARA last time in town and did well to keep her at bay. No rise in weight and draws well again. Is sure to be very competitive. MAJESTIC GLOW (8) wasn't fancied on debut at Oakbank but stuck on soundly to finish second. Is sure to have come on from that and should have enough pace to offset the wide draw. Can give a sight. PRANCING LILY (9) improved sharply third-up when chasing gamely into fourth. Is open to further improvement and is worth including in exotics.
